summary: Comprehensive testing of Fork 3 features for KdM TikTok clone. All features working correctly: TikTok snap-scroll with GPU acceleration, swipe navigation on WatchStreamPage, React.memo optimization on all key components, Dark/Light mode toggle with localStorage persistence, Mobile UX with 5-tab bottom nav and hidden sidebar, Live streams in feed, Nested comments UI with Reply buttons and View replies, Gift drawer with animations, Capacitor integration ready.

tiktok_snap_scroll.details: snap-scroll container with scroll-snap-type: y mandatory, snap-item with will-change: transform and translateZ(0) for GPU acceleration. Smooth scrolling between videos confirmed.

swipe_navigation.details: WatchStreamPage has useSwipeable handlers (onSwipedUp/Down) with delta=50. Swipe indicators visible: 'Swipe up pentru next' and 'Swipe down pentru prev'. Multiple streams available for navigation.

components_verified: CommentReply (line 287) - React.memo wrapper with ml-11 indent
react_memo_optimization.details: All key components wrapped with React.memo to prevent unnecessary re-renders. Lazy loading implemented for ShareModal.

dark_light_mode.details: Theme toggle button in header (Sun/Moon icons). Toggles between dark-mode and light-mode CSS classes on document.documentElement. Persists to localStorage with key 'kdm-theme'.
verified_flow: After second toggle: dark-mode class, localStorage='dark'

mobile_ux.sidebar: Hidden on mobile (lg:flex), visible on desktop
mobile_ux.navigation_arrows: Hidden on mobile, visible on desktop (hidden lg:flex)

live_streams_in_feed.details: Active live streams fetched from /api/live/active and mixed into For You feed at positions 0 and 3. LIVE badge with viewer count displayed on stream cards.
live_streams_in_feed.api_response: 2 active streams returned with viewer counts

ui_elements: View X replies button to expand nested replies
ml-11 indent class for nested reply display
nested_comments.backend_support: Comments have 'replies' count field, /api/videos/comments/{id}/replies endpoint working

gift_animations.details: Gift drawer opens with 'Trimite Cadou' header, shows user coin balance, grid of gifts with icons and costs. FlyingGift component has sparkle animations and glow effects.

capacitor_integration.hook: useCapacitor.js with platform detection, StatusBar config, SplashScreen handling

critical_code_review_comments: GPU acceleration CSS correctly applied (will-change, translateZ)
Theme system properly persists to localStorage
Capacitor config valid for iOS/Android builds
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fork 3 features fully tested and working: Performance optimization (React.memo, GPU acceleration), Capacitor integration, Dark/Light mode. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend snap-scroll, swipe navigation, nested comments, gift drawer all verified. 2 active live streams available for testing. Chat messages in WatchStreamPage are MOCKED (static array, no WebSocket) - this is intentional for demo.

mocked_apis.chat_messages: WatchStreamPage lines 195-199 - static mock array, WebSocket not implemented
